AgenticPrecomputeRequest.description:
Populate the decision cache for ``(symbols × dates)``.

Used by the Quickstart Wizard and by power users who want to reuse a
cached crew run across multiple strategy configs.
AgenticPrecomputeRequest.title: AgenticPrecomputeRequest

ChatContext.description:
Optional ambient context the webui passes with every chat call.

The fields mirror the route a user is currently on so the assistant
can answer questions like "summarize this backtest" or "what's the
last close for this symbol" without the user repeating themselves.
ChatContext.title: ChatContext

duration_str.description: IBKR duration string such as '10 D', '1 W', '3 M', '1 Y'
duration_str.title: Duration Str

end_date_time.description: IBKR endDateTime override; used with duration_str
end_date_time.title: End Date Time

rows.description: Max rows returned to UI payload
rows.title: Rows

duration_str.description: IBKR duration string such as '10 D', '1 W', '3 M', '1 Y'
duration_str.title: Duration Str

end_date_time.description: IBKR endDateTime override; used with duration_str
end_date_time.title: End Date Time

rows.description: Max rows returned to UI payload
rows.title: Rows

source_dir.description: Absolute path on the host filesystem
source_dir.title: Source Dir

ParameterSpec.description:
Single sweep parameter.

Specify either an explicit ``values`` list or a ``low``/``high``/``step``
numeric range. ``path`` uses dotted notation into the strategy config,
e.g. ``"strategy.kwargs.alpha_model.kwargs.lookback"``.
ParameterSpec.title: ParameterSpec

PreviewRequest.description: Interactive preview request — small, fast, no MLflow side-effects.
PreviewRequest.title: PreviewRequest

kafka_emit_as.description: bar | quote | tick | signal -- how KafkaDataFeed materializes records. Ignored for non-kafka venues.
kafka_emit_as.title: Kafka Emit As

kafka_topic.description: Override the Kafka topic consumed when venue='kafka'. Defaults to features.normalized.v1.
kafka_topic.title: Kafka Topic

available.description: True if the broker SDK is installed
available.title: Available

endpoint.description: host:port the adapter would dial (only set for venues with a fixed local endpoint, e.g. IBKR)
endpoint.title: Endpoint

reachable.description: True/False if a quick TCP probe succeeded; None when not applicable.
reachable.title: Reachable

info.description: Local-first quantitative research + trading API. Drives the agent crew, backtests, paper / live trading, RL training, and data ingestion. The Dash monitor is mounted at /dash.
info.title: Agentic Quant Platform API

Expose the provider catalog so the UI wizard can populate dropdowns.
Return the :class:`AgentBacktest` sidecar row, or 404.

schema.title: Response Get Sidecar Agentic Sidecar  Backtest Id  Get
Response List Crews Agents Crews Get

get.description:
Return the most recent events for a task.

For active tasks we prefer the Redis pub/sub backlog (tapped via the
sync helper in :mod:`aqp.ws.broker`). For completed tasks we fall back
to the ``CrewRun.events`` snapshot persisted by the worker at the end
of a run. If neither is available we return an empty list instead of
404-ing.

schema.title: Response Crew Events Agents Crews  Task Id  Events Get
Response List Optimizations Backtest Optimize Get

post.description:
Expand the parameter space, persist the run + trials, and queue work.

The expansion happens on the API side so the UI can watch trials
complete one-by-one; the worker task then pops queued trials until
the run is exhausted.

get.description: Compact trials payload for the heatmap / top-N panel.

are rejected to keep the playground safe; use the dedicated order
endpoints instead.

Response Venue Submit Order Brokers  Venue  Orders Post
Response Venue Cancel Order Brokers  Venue  Orders  Order Id  Delete
Response Venue Positions Brokers  Venue  Positions Get

get.description:
Connect-probe + account summary so UIs can render a green/red light.

Diagnostic ladder for IBKR (matches the descriptor logic):

1. SDK missing            -> ok=False, action: install ``ib-async``.
2. Gateway port closed    -> ok=False, action: start TWS / IB Gateway.
3. SDK + port open, but   -> ok=False, error from ``IB.connectAsync``,
   authenticated connect     usually a clientId clash or API gate
   fails                     in the gateway settings.
4. Everything ok          -> ok=True, returns the live account summary.

Each rung is reachable from the UI's status pill so the user knows
exactly which precondition broke.

schema.title: Response Venue Status Brokers  Venue  Status Get
Response Messages Chat Sessions  Session Id  Messages Get

post.description:
Evaluate ``req.formula`` on a small bar slice and return a sample + IC.

Designed to power the Factor Workbench "Formula Lab" preview — we don't
hit Celery, we don't log to MLflow, and we cap the response to the last
``req.rows`` rows for fast round-trips.

Response List Models Ml Models Get

get.description:
Richer per-model payload used by the ML Model Detail UI page.

Fields:

- ``summary`` — base :class:`ModelSummary` fields.
- ``metrics`` — metrics dict stored on the row + any MLflow metrics we
  can retrieve via the tracking URI.
- ``feature_importance`` — list of ``{name, importance}`` pairs when
  the registered model exposes one.
- ``predictions`` — most recent test-set predictions with ``label`` and
  ``score`` columns (first ``top_k`` rows).
- ``lineage`` — dataset_hash + MLflow run id for deep-linking.

schema.title: Response Get Model Details Ml Models  Model Id  Details Get
Response List Pipelines Ml Pipelines Get

get.description: Introspect registered Model classes in :mod:`aqp.ml.models`.

schema.title: Response Registered Models Ml Registered Get

get.description:
Enriched strategy catalog for the browser UI.

Joins :class:`Strategy` with the most recent :class:`StrategyTest` +
:class:`BacktestRun` to show the latest Sharpe / return / MLflow run id
per strategy, filtered by optional tag / status / query / min_sharpe.

schema.title: Response Browse Strategies Strategies Browse Get

get.description:
Catalog of *code-available* alpha classes (not user-saved strategies).

Pulls the tag list from :mod:`aqp.strategies` (``STRATEGY_TAGS`` per
module) and pairs each class with any ``configs/strategies/*.yaml``
recipes that reference it, so the UI can show "here are all the alphas
you can instantiate + example YAMLs".

schema.title: Response Strategy Catalog Strategies Browse Catalog Get
